title: LN13 9PL, LJ Fairburn and Son Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/EP3428LJ/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: LJ Fairburn and Son Limited Installation name: Whitton Farm Permit number: EPR/EP3428LJ  "
